copy.title: SuperSonicBrick Stackable Storage Brick 2L, Sky Blue, BPA-Free Polypropylene Food Storage Container
bullets: 2 L storage capacity for organizing dry goods, snacks, leftovers, or small household items in kitchens, pantries, and drawers.
Stackable brick-style shape helps save space and supports neat, modular storage when paired with other compatible containers.
Made from BPA-Free Polypropylene for a lightweight, durable container designed for everyday food storage use.
Sky Blue color adds a clean, modern look while making contents easy to identify in storage areas.
Single unit order includes 1 container measuring 20.0 x 14.0 x 10.0 cm and weighing 273.0 g for convenient handling.
copy.description: SuperSonicBrick Stackable Storage Brick 2L is a single food storage container designed for everyday home organization. Made from BPA-Free Polypropylene, it offers a 2-liter capacity in a stackable brick-style form. The Sky Blue container measures 20.0 x 14.0 x 10.0 cm and is suitable for storing dry goods, snacks, leftovers, or household items in kitchens and pantry spaces.
copy.search_terms: stackable storage container food storage 2l bpa free polypropylene sky blue kitchen pantry brick shape modular organizer

a_plus_modules.headline: Stackable Storage Made Simple
a_plus_modules.body: Keep small items neat with the SuperSonicBrick 2L storage brick. The sky blue, BPA-free polypropylene design stacks securely to help maximize space in kitchens, craft rooms, or offices.
a_plus_modules.alt_text: Sky blue 2L stackable storage brick in a tidy room

a_plus_modules.headline: Durable BPA-Free Polypropylene
a_plus_modules.body: Made from BPA-free polypropylene, this 2L storage brick offers lightweight organization with a clean, durable finish. Designed to stack for flexible storage and easy everyday use.
a_plus_modules.alt_text: Sky blue BPA-free polypropylene storage brick close-up
